title: Scape and Run: Revenants
description: This mod adds hostile ghosts into your Minecraft Game
body:
This mod adds hostile ghosts into your Minecraft Game

 

They currently have no specific biome, so you can find them anywhere...

 

But before that your world starts without them, for Revenants to spawn, mobs that are not considered UNDEAD have to die/be killed.

After a certain number of deaths they will start to spawn.

 

Right now they have very basic AI but in the future I will improve it and will add more tiers/effects
